ov_overview_body.en: Disney California Adventure is the second gate at Disneyland Resort in Anaheim, California, celebrating the magic, adventure and spirit of California and the stories of Pixar and Marvel. Opened in 2001 and massively expanded in 2012 with the addition of Cars Land and Buena Vista Street, the park now features some of the greatest theme park attractions ever created including Radiator Springs Racers, Guardians of the Galaxy Mission BREAKOUT! and the extraordinary Avengers Campus. Disney California Adventure is consistently rated one of the finest theme parks in the United States.
ov_overview_body.es: Disney California Adventure es el segundo parque de Disneyland Resort en Anaheim, California. Inaugurado en 2001 y ampliado en 2012 con Cars Land. Es uno de los mejores parques de EE.UU.
ov_overview_body.fr: Disney California Adventure est le deuxieme parc de Disneyland Resort a Anaheim. Ouvert en 2001 et agrandi en 2012 avec Cars Land. L'un des meilleurs parcs aux Etats-Unis.
ov_overview_body.de: Disney California Adventure ist der zweite Park des Disneyland Resort in Anaheim. 2001 eroffnet und 2012 mit Cars Land erweitert. Einer der besten Parks in den USA.
ov_overview_body.it: Disney California Adventure e il secondo parco del Disneyland Resort ad Anaheim. Aperto nel 2001 e ampliato nel 2012 con Cars Land. Uno dei migliori parchi negli USA.
ov_overview_body.nl: Disney California Adventure is het tweede park van Disneyland Resort in Anaheim. Geopend in 2001 en uitgebreid in 2012 met Cars Land. Een van de beste parken in de VS.
ov_overview_body.pt: Disney California Adventure e o segundo parque do Disneyland Resort em Anaheim. Aberto em 2001 e ampliado em 2012 com Cars Land. Um dos melhores parques dos EUA.
ov_overview_body.ru: Disney California Adventure — второй парк Disneyland Resort в Анахайме. Открыт в 2001 г. Один из лучших парков США.
ov_overview_body.zh: 迪士尼加州冒险乐园是安纳海姆迪士尼度假園第二个主题公园、2001年开放，2012年扩建了汽车小镇。美国最优秀的主题公园之一。
ov_overview_body.ar: Disney California Adventure هو ثاني متنزه في Disneyland Resort بأناهايم. افتتح 2001 وتوسع 2012 بإضافة Cars Land.

ov_highlights_body.en: Radiator Springs Racers is consistently voted one of the greatest theme park attractions ever created. Guardians of the Galaxy Mission BREAKOUT! is the most thrilling drop tower at any Disney park. Avengers Campus brings Marvel superheroes to life in an extraordinary immersive land. Soarin Around the World is one of the most universally beloved attractions at any Disney resort. Cars Land at dusk is one of the most magical experiences in theme park history. The Grand Californian Hotel has its own private entrance directly into the park.
ov_highlights_body.es: Radiator Springs Racers es una de las mejores atracciones de parques de Disney. Guardians of the Galaxy es la torre de caida mas emocionante. Avengers Campus trae los superheroes Marvel a la vida. Cars Land al atardecer es magico.
ov_highlights_body.fr: Radiator Springs Racers est regulierement vote comme l une des meilleures attractions. Guardians of the Galaxy est la tour de chute la plus palpitante. Avengers Campus donne vie aux super-heros Marvel. Cars Land au crepuscule est magique.
ov_highlights_body.de: Radiator Springs Racers wird regelmassig als eine der besten Attraktionen gewahlt. Guardians of the Galaxy ist der aufregendste Fallturm. Avengers Campus erweckt Marvel-Superhelden zum Leben. Cars Land in der Dammerung ist magisch.
ov_highlights_body.it: Radiator Springs Racers e regolarmente votata come una delle migliori attrazioni. Guardians of the Galaxy e la torre di caduta piu emozionante. Avengers Campus da vita ai supereroi Marvel. Cars Land al tramonto e magica.
ov_highlights_body.nl: Radiator Springs Racers wordt regelmatig gekozen als een van de beste attracties. Guardians of the Galaxy is de meest opwindende valtoren. Avengers Campus brengt Marvel superhelden tot leven. Cars Land in de schemering is magisch.
ov_highlights_body.pt: Radiator Springs Racers e regularmente eleita uma das melhores atracoes. Guardians of the Galaxy e a torre de queda mais emocionante. Avengers Campus da vida aos super-herois Marvel. Cars Land ao crepusculo e magico.
ov_highlights_body.ru: Radiator Springs Racers — одна из лучших аттракций. Avengers Campus оживляет героев Marvel.
ov_highlights_body.zh: 跨越汤汽车镇赛车被公认为世界最佳景点之一。复仇者任务是迪士尼最刺激的降落塔楼项目。复仇者联盟让漫威超英雄活跃起来。
ov_highlights_body.ar: Radiator Springs Racers من أفضل الاتراكشنس. Avengers Campus يجسد أبطال Marvel.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Disney California Adventure opened in 2001 as a celebration of the state of California and was extensively reimagined and expanded between 2007 and 2012. Cars Land opened in 2012 and is considered one of the finest themed lands ever created at any theme park in the world. The Grand Californian Hotel was designed by architect Peter Dominick and opened with the park in 2001, featuring its own private entrance directly into the park. Radiator Springs Racers took over 7 years to design and build. Avengers Campus opened in 2021 and was the first Marvel-themed land at any Disney resort in the United States.
ov_did_you_know_body.es: Disney California Adventure abrio en 2001 y fue ampliamente renovado entre 2007 y 2012. Cars Land abierto en 2012 es una de las mejores tierras tematicas. El Grand Californian tiene su propia entrada directa al parque. Avengers Campus fue la primera tierra Marvel en un resort Disney de EE.UU.
ov_did_you_know_body.fr: Disney California Adventure a ouvert en 2001 et a ete largement renove entre 2007 et 2012. Cars Land ouvert en 2012 est l'une des meilleures terres thematiques. Le Grand Californian a sa propre entree dans le parc. Avengers Campus est le premier territoire Marvel dans un resort Disney americain.
ov_did_you_know_body.de: Disney California Adventure eroffnete 2001 und wurde zwischen 2007 und 2012 umfassend umgestaltet. Cars Land gilt als eines der besten Themengebiete. Das Grand Californian hat einen eigenen Eingang in den Park. Avengers Campus war das erste Marvel-Land in einem US-Disney-Resort.
ov_did_you_know_body.it: Disney California Adventure apri nel 2001 e fu ampiamente rinnovato tra il 2007 e il 2012. Cars Land e considerata una delle migliori terre tematiche. Il Grand Californian ha il proprio ingresso nel parco. Avengers Campus fu il primo territorio Marvel in un resort Disney americano.
ov_did_you_know_body.nl: Disney California Adventure opende in 2001 en werd uitgebreid gerenoveerd tussen 2007 en 2012. Cars Land wordt beschouwd als een van de beste themalanden. Het Grand Californian heeft zijn eigen ingang in het park. Avengers Campus was het eerste Marvel-land in een Amerikaans Disney resort.
ov_did_you_know_body.pt: Disney California Adventure abriu em 2001 e foi amplamente renovado entre 2007 e 2012. Cars Land e considerada uma das melhores terras tematicas. O Grand Californian tem a sua propria entrada no parque. Avengers Campus foi o primeiro territorio Marvel num resort Disney americano.
ov_did_you_know_body.ru: Disney California Adventure открылся в 2001 г. Cars Land — одна из лучших тематических зон. Avengers Campus — первая зона Marvel в США.
ov_did_you_know_body.zh: 迪士尼加州冒险乐园于2001年开放，2007至2012年间大规模改造。汽车小镇被认为是有史以来最优秀的主题区域之一。
ov_did_you_know_body.ar: Disney California Adventure افتتح 2001 وتم تجديده بين 2007-2012. Cars Land من أفضل المناطق الموضوعية.

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at park opening and head straight to Radiator Springs Racers via the Cars Land entrance — it builds to 90-minute queues by 9am. Use Lightning Lane for Rise of the Resistance if visiting Galaxy's Edge. Guardians Mission BREAKOUT second and WEB SLINGERS third. Soarin is best in the evening with shorter waits. Cars Land at dusk is unmissable — the Cadillac Range glows magnificently in the golden light. The Grand Californian Hotel pool is spectacular for an evening swim. Buy tickets in advance as popular dates sell out.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve directamente a Radiator Springs Racers. Usa Lightning Lane para las principales atracciones. Cars Land al atardecer es imperdible. Compra entradas con antelacion.
ov_plan_body.fr: Arrivez a l'ouverture et allez directement a Radiator Springs Racers. Utilisez Lightning Lane pour les principales attractions. Cars Land au crepuscule est incontournable. Achetez les billets a l'avance.
ov_plan_body.de: Kommen Sie zur Eroffnung und gehen Sie direkt zu Radiator Springs Racers. Nutzen Sie Lightning Lane fur die wichtigsten Attraktionen. Cars Land in der Dammerung ist ein Muss. Tickets im Voraus kaufen.
ov_plan_body.it: Arriva all'apertura e vai direttamente a Radiator Springs Racers. Usa Lightning Lane per le attrazioni principali. Cars Land al tramonto e imperdibile. Acquista i biglietti in anticipo.
ov_plan_body.nl: Kom bij opening en ga direct naar Radiator Springs Racers. Gebruik Lightning Lane voor de belangrijkste attracties. Cars Land in de schemering is een must. Koop tickets van tevoren.
ov_plan_body.pt: Chega na abertura e vai directamente a Radiator Springs Racers. Usa Lightning Lane para as principais atracoes. Cars Land ao crepusculo e imperdivel. Compra bilhetes com antecedencia.
ov_plan_body.ru: Приходите к открытию. Radiator Springs Racers — первым. Lightning Lane рекомендуется.
ov_plan_body.zh: 开园时到达直接前往跨越赛车。建议Flash Lane。日落时的汽车小镇必不可错过。提前购票。
ov_plan_body.ar: اذهب مباشرة لـ Radiator Springs Racers. Cars Land عند الغروب لا يفوت.

ov_photos_body.en: Cars Land photographed at dusk with the Cadillac Range glowing in golden light and Radiator Springs lit up below is the defining image of Disney California Adventure. Guardians of the Galaxy Mission BREAKOUT! photographed from below showing the full tower height against the California sky is spectacular. The Grand Californian Hotel photographed from Paradise Bay at golden hour is magnificent. WEB SLINGERS photographed showing the extraordinary Avengers Campus architecture is iconic. Soarin photographed showing the giant wraparound screen from below is extraordinary.
ov_photos_body.es: Cars Land fotografiado al atardecer con la Cadillac Range brillando es la imagen definitiva. Guardians fotografiado desde abajo es espectacular. El Grand Californian desde Paradise Bay es magnifico.
ov_photos_body.fr: Cars Land photographie au crepuscule avec la Cadillac Range brillante est l image definitive. Guardians photographie depuis le bas est spectaculaire. Le Grand Californian depuis Paradise Bay est magnifique.
ov_photos_body.de: Cars Land in der Dammerung mit leuchtender Cadillac Range ist das definitive Bild. Guardians von unten fotografiert ist spektakular. Das Grand Californian von Paradise Bay ist prachtvoll.
ov_photos_body.it: Cars Land fotografata al tramonto con la Cadillac Range illuminata e l immagine definitiva. Guardians fotografato dal basso e spettacolare. Il Grand Californian da Paradise Bay e magnifico.
ov_photos_body.nl: Cars Land gefotografeerd in de schemering met de gloeiende Cadillac Range is het definitieve beeld. Guardians van onderaf gefotografeerd is spectaculair. Het Grand Californian vanaf Paradise Bay is prachtig.
ov_photos_body.pt: Cars Land fotografado ao crepusculo com a Cadillac Range brilhante e a imagem definitiva. Guardians fotografado de baixo e espetacular. O Grand Californian de Paradise Bay e magnifico.
ov_photos_body.ru: Cars Land на закате — главный снимок.
ov_photos_body.zh: 日落时的汽车小镇是加州冒险乐园的标志性影像。
ov_photos_body.ar: Cars Land عند الغروب هو الصورة المحددة.
